name: 3 ML Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Eye Drops
about: 3 ML Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Eye Drops is a liquid medication recommended for eye care. It is used to treat conditions related to glaucoma and ocular hypertension. This medication works by reducing the pressure inside the eye which can damage the optic nerve. The dosage guidelines for this medication should be followed as per the suggestion of a physician. The recommended dosage and usage of this medication should not be altered without consulting a healthcare professional. It is advised to store this medication in a dry place to maintain its efficacy.
